events.description: title 'Rebasing' fades in with icon
main branch line draws in from left to right
2 base commits pop in on main branch
feature branch line draws in below main
subtitle 'completely different' emphasis text appears
3 feature commits pop in staggered on feature branch
'merge commit' text appears crossed out in red
first commit lifts off feature branch, arcs upward to main — replay begins
first commit lands on main with scale pop and glow — new hash d7e2
second commit lifts off feature branch, arcs to main
second commit lands on main — new hash e9a5
third commit lifts off feature branch, arcs to main
third commit lands on main — new hash f1b8
'NEW HASH' label appears above replayed commits with annotation
'parent changed' annotation dot appears below first replayed commit
ghost commits on feature branch pulse brighter — old commits highlighted
'OBJECT DATABASE' label appears at bottom with explanation text
garbage collection sweep line begins moving across feature branch — red glow
ghost commits start fading out as GC sweep passes over them
feature branch line fades away, old commits fully cleaned up
